title: Parallax Model Descriptor (M1 metamodel)
description: Canonical, serialized form of the M1 metamodel. A model descriptor is an instance of this schema. Grown one metamodel phase at a time; this revision covers entity + attribute + pkGenerator + relationship + index + asOfAttribute (the M7 temporal dimension) + inheritance (table-per-hierarchy with a discriminator, or table-per-leaf; table-per-class is REJECTED, DQ9) + valueObject (an embedded composite element mapped to a single JSONB column, a deliberate deviation from Reladomo's column-flattening), and admits multiple entities per descriptor (a single `entity` for one-entity models, or an `entities` array for multi-entity models with relationships between them).

entities.description: Two or more entities mapped in one descriptor (so relationships can name sibling entities). Mutually exclusive with the single `entity` form.

neutralType.description: M0 neutral data type. The decimal type carries precision/scale, e.g. decimal(18,2). The `json` type (-> JSONB) is the embedded-value type a valueObject element maps to.

valueObjects.description: Embedded composite elements mapped to JSONB columns (M1/M0; a deliberate deviation from Reladomo's column-flattening).

relationship.description: A navigable association. Joins are auto-derived from the navigation predicate, so a query never writes ON-conditions by hand.

reverseName.description: Optional reverse-relationship name on the related entity.

dependent.description: True when the target is owned by this entity (participates in cascade, M5).

foreignKey.description: Optional foreign-key hint (column on the many side).

orderBy.description: Optional ordering for a to-many relationship.

attributes.description: Ordered list of attribute names participating in the index.

unique.description: True for a unique index (enables the cache fast-path).

asOfAttribute.description: A temporal dimension (M7): a query-time virtual attribute backed by a [from, to) interval over a pair of timestamp columns. An entity with one asOfAttribute is unitemporal (processing or business); with two it is bitemporal. The open upper bound (`to`) is the database-native infinity (M0/M11). Phase 5 (temporal MVP) exercises the single-axis `processing` (audit-only) profile.

fromColumn.description: The interval's inclusive lower-bound column (the `from`/`in` column).

toColumn.description: The interval's upper-bound column (the `to`/`out`/`thru` column); equals infinity for a current row.

axis.description: Which temporal axis this dimension models. `processing` is when the system knew a fact (audit / as-of-now); `business` is when the fact is true in the world.

toIsInclusive.description: Interval closure. false (default) ⇒ [from, to); true ⇒ [from, to].

infinity.description: The open-bound sentinel = the database-native infinity (the M11 dialect owns the concrete representation). Always `infinity` in the canonical descriptor; a dialect lacking native infinity maps it to a documented max-sentinel.

default.description: Default-if-unspecified for this dimension when a query omits it. `now` ⇒ as-of-the-current-instant (the current milestone, i.e. to = infinity). Only `now` is defined for the temporal MVP.

valueObject.description: An embedded composite element stored as a single JSONB column (DQ9 definitely-do). Unlike Reladomo's column-flattening, the whole value object is one `json`-typed column; its inner fields are read/filtered with the M2 nested-attribute access form (`Class.valueObject.path`). The mapping is JSONB-only in core.

type.description: The value-object's logical (struct) type name; documentary, not a neutral scalar type.

column.description: The single JSONB column the whole value object is stored in.

mapping.description: Storage mapping. JSONB is the only mapping defined in core.

inheritance.description: Inheritance mapping for an entity that is part of a class hierarchy (DQ9 definitely-do). Two strategies are admitted: `table-per-hierarchy` (the whole hierarchy in one table, rows discriminated by a `discriminator` column carrying the leaf class's `value`) and `table-per-leaf` (one table per concrete leaf, no discriminator). `table-per-class` (one table per class joined at query time) is NOT a legal strategy and is REJECTED by this schema.

strategy.description: The mapping strategy. table-per-class is intentionally absent: the enum rejects it.

role.description: This entity's position in the hierarchy: the abstract/concrete `root` that owns the shared table (table-per-hierarchy) or names the hierarchy, or a `subtype` leaf.

parent.description: For a `subtype`, the name of the entity it extends (its immediate parent / hierarchy root).

discriminator.description: table-per-hierarchy only: the column distinguishing leaf classes within the shared table. Absent for table-per-leaf (no shared table).

column.description: The discriminator column name in the shared table.

discriminatorValue.description: table-per-hierarchy only: the value the discriminator column carries for THIS entity's rows. Set on each entity (root and subtype) whose rows live in the shared table.

allOf.description: A subtype MUST name its parent; a root MUST NOT.

pkGenerator.description: Primary-key generation strategy. Only the strategy keyword is required; sequence carries extra fields.
